content.text:
Based on my visual analysis of atom 31 (C:31), I can identify its covalently bonded neighbour atoms:

## Neighbour Atoms of Atom 31 (Carbon):

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 13 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 8 | C (Carbon) |
| 27 | C (Carbon) |
| 43 | H (Hydrogen) |

## Summary:
- **Atom 31** is a carbon atom with **4 covalent bonds** (as expected for carbon)
- It is bonded to: one nitrogen (N:13), two carbons (C:8 and C:27), and one hydrogen (H:43)
- This forms a chiral center with tetrahedral geometry

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 31, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
